offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 bids/month, inconsistent bid responses cause lost contracts. We generate standardized estimates and RFP responses instead of manual bid preparation using spreadsheets and templates.
problem: Inconsistent bid responses lead to lost contracts and wasted time.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Participate in forums for construction tools and resources
try_it: Let users try template library for estimates and collaboration tools
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequently used inputs as templates
Allow CSV import for existing project data
